title: Config 3: adamw width=192 depth=3 batch=96 aug=affine
methodology: Generated a 3-hidden-layer MLP with width 192, batch size 96, adamw at lr=0.001, dropout=0.1, weight_decay=1e-05, augmentation=affine, and label_smoothing=0.1.
motivation: Brief insight: ## Research Brief: Tiny MNIST Classifier (tiny-mnist). Building on exp-002-baseline-2-layer-mlp with a focused hyperparameter/architecture change.
